---
description: Documentation guidance for My Launchpad
applyTo: "**/*.md"
---

# Documentation Skills - My Launchpad

## Documentation Standards

- Keep docs task-oriented and concise.
- Explain why a change exists, not only what changed.
- Include runnable examples for commands and workflows.
- Keep setup, troubleshooting, and release notes up to date.

## Domain Focus

For My Launchpad (macOS app launcher with groups, hotkeys, and drag-drop organization):
- Describe user workflows with clear step-by-step instructions.
- Call out platform-specific requirements and permissions.
- Include known constraints and expected behavior under failure.

## API and Internal Docs

- Public interfaces should have clear parameter and return descriptions.
- Complex logic should include short rationale comments.
- Record architectural decisions in ADR format when tradeoffs are involved.
